notes: OpenClaw is MIT-licensed open source with no paid tier visible in the repo. Commercial analysis is limited.

funding.note: Listed as sponsors in README with logos. No funding round data visible in repo.

commercial_signals.signal: ClawHub plugin registry (https://clawhub.ai) -- separate commercial surface for plugin discovery/publishing
fly.io and Render deployment configs included -- suggests hosted/cloud deployment is a supported path

revenue_model_inferences.inference: Likely freemium or ecosystem play -- core is MIT, ClawHub may be monetized. No SaaS tier visible in source.
